protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: VLPs were washed 3x with PBS and treated with 1% Empigen, 1% Tween 20, or 1% Triton X-100 for 10 minutes at room temperature; lysed in sample buffer with SDS, boiled 5 min
